takeaway: Most people only ever use ==the plain chat box==.
intro: Each major chatbot has real, named features beyond typing a question and getting an answer back. A full reference, grouped by what you're trying to do — click a platform to expand its table.

features.name: Projects
features.what: Group files and instructions into one reusable workspace, so Claude keeps the same context across every chat inside it.

features.name: Memory
features.what: Claude remembers your name, preferences, and ongoing projects across separate conversations. View or delete anything it's stored, anytime.

features.name: Extended thinking
features.what: A toggle that lets Claude spend more time breaking down a problem and exploring approaches before answering — visible as a "thinking" section above the reply.

features.name: Web search
features.what: Toggle on so Claude can check the live web for current information, with citations you can check yourself.

features.name: Research
features.what: A deeper mode where Claude runs many searches on its own, following up on what it finds, and returns a cited answer in minutes.

features.name: Artifacts
features.what: Pop code, documents, or diagrams out into an editable side panel you can iterate on and export.

features.name: File & image uploads
features.what: Upload PDFs, Word docs, spreadsheets, or photos for Claude to read, summarize, or analyze.

features.name: Google Workspace connectors
features.what: Connect Gmail, Calendar, and Drive so Claude can search your email, manage your calendar, and work with your documents.

features.name: Skills (`/` menu)
features.what: Type `/` in the chat box to browse ready-made abilities and invoke one by name — like a saved writing style you reuse across chats.

features.name: Custom GPTs
features.what: Build your own tailored version of ChatGPT with its own instructions, files, and tools — no coding required.

features.name: Memory
features.what: ChatGPT remembers useful details across chats so you don't have to repeat yourself. View, edit, or clear it in Settings.

features.name: Scheduled tasks
features.what: Ask ChatGPT to check on something or remind you later, on a repeating schedule — briefings, reminders, monitoring.

features.name: Deep research
features.what: Describe what you need, and ChatGPT reads and synthesizes many sources into a documented, cited report.

features.name: Images
features.what: Generate an image from a description, or upload one and ask for specific edits, in plain language.

features.name: Data analysis
features.what: Upload a spreadsheet or CSV and ask questions about it — ChatGPT writes and runs the code to summarize, chart, or clean it.

features.name: Advanced Voice Mode
features.what: A real back-and-forth spoken conversation, not just text read aloud — it listens, responds, and picks up on tone.

features.name: Apps & connectors
features.what: Connect Gmail, Google Drive, and other apps so ChatGPT can search and reference your own information when asked.

features.name: Tool menu (`/`)
features.what: Type `/` in the message box to pull up tools like Search on the spot, instead of hunting through menus.

features.name: Gems
features.what: Save a custom version of Gemini with its own instructions and files for a task you repeat often.

features.name: Deep Research
features.what: Gemini browses dozens of sites on its own and writes up a cited, multi-page report on a topic you assign.

features.name: Guided Learning
features.what: A tutoring mode that breaks a topic into steps and questions instead of just handing you an answer.

features.name: Image generation & editing
features.what: Create an image from a description, or upload one and ask for specific edits in plain language.

features.name: Canvas
features.what: A shared workspace for building a document, app, or slides with Gemini step by step, not just one long reply.

features.name: Live
features.what: Talk to Gemini out loud and show it your camera or screen — it sees what you see and talks you through it in real time.

features.name: Workspace integration
features.what: On paid plans, Gemini reads and drafts directly inside Gmail, Docs, and Drive, using your own files and email as context.

features.name: Connected apps
features.what: Let Gemini work with other apps you use — Calendar, YouTube Music, Google Home, and more — with your permission.

features.name: App mentions (`@`)
features.what: Type `@` in the chat box to point Gemini at a specific app in your prompt — like `@Google Tasks` to add a to-do.
